name: UK 5-Year-Ahead Inflation Expectations (BoE/Ipsos)
notes: BoE/Ipsos Inflation Attitudes Survey, Q.2c median expected inflation "in five years time" (§2.B B4). Quarterly XLSX (long-run.xlsx, sheet LONG-RUN) parsed by sources/boe_survey.py — not an IADB timeseries, so it cannot ride sources/boe.py. Verified live 2026-07-15: 70 obs 2009-02 -> 2026-05 = 3.9 percent. Long-run UK household inflation-expectations anchor.

series_id: credit-conditions|Corporate annex|availability of credit provided to the corporate sector|Past three months
name: UK Corporate Credit Availability (BoE Credit Conditions Survey)
notes: BoE Credit Conditions Survey, Corporate annex — net % balance of lenders reporting increased availability of credit to the corporate sector over the past 3 months (B6). Quarterly XLSX whose URL embeds the quarter, resolved by sources/boe_survey.py walking back from the current quarter. Positive = credit availability increased. Verified live 2026-07-16: 77 obs 2007-Q2 -> 2026-Q2. UK-side companion to EZ_CREDIT_STD_ENT (ECB BLS) on the credit cycle.
